boundary: Naturalistic real-QA eval: gold passage at a varying position, graded vs the dataset's gold answer (EM/F1 + >=2 judges). A GO here would NOT be construct-bounded the way the synthetic battery is — but is still corpus-bound and NOT AGI. canClaimAGI:false.

closedBookControl.note: high closed-book => parametric leakage (HotpotQA may be memorised)

criticalFailures: no_effect_ci: delta tokens-per-solved bootstrap CI does not exclude 0 on the negative (fewer-tokens) side
no_effect_anytime_cs: the Robbins anytime-valid confidence sequence does not exclude 0 (the peek-robust interval)
explorationNote: Budget sweep (transparency): at budget 300 (~4% of context) ALL arms floored (<=0.10 solved) and closed-book (0.10) beat the context arms -> leakage/floor confound. At budget 1200 (~17%) the floor lifts, leakage is controlled (closed-book 0.10 << anchored), and the expected ordering appears (anchored>priority>recency>closed-book) with anchored most token-efficient. This committed result is the budget-1200 read. EXPLORATORY ONLY: N=30, 1 seed, public split -> the Delta CI includes 0 (underpowered). Direction is favourable but UNCONFIRMED. canClaimAGI:false.
subject: deepseek:deepseek-chat
